meta.walletDescription: Review your current wallet balances and summary totals without overbuilding the finance suite.
meta.ledgerDescription: Review your ledger history entries without jumping into settlements or payout tooling.
meta.settlementsDescription: Review settlement records and status updates without entering payout tooling.

summary.title: Review your wallet summary without jumping into ledger or settlement detail.
summary.note: This summary is derived from the financial ledger. It shows balances and totals that are ready for visibility now.

scopeItems.balances: Current balances split by availability state.
scopeItems.totals: Lifetime earned and paid out totals.

boundaryItems.noLedger: Ledger detail is available in a separate ledger screen.
boundaryItems.noSettlements: Settlement visibility is a separate surface.
boundaryItems.noPayouts: Payout actions and scheduling are not part of this baseline.

empty.heading: Wallet summary is not available yet
empty.note: The current wallet summary could not be loaded.

error.heading: Wallet summary is not available right now

ledger.title: Review ledger history entries tied to your practitioner wallet.
ledger.note: This ledger provides a visibility-first history of financial entries linked to sessions, payments, and settlements.

scopeItems.history: Ledger history with entry types and timestamps.
scopeItems.references: References to related payments, sessions, or settlement records.

boundaryItems.noPayouts: Payout actions are not available in this ledger view.
boundaryItems.noSettlements: Settlement detail lives on the settlements surface.
boundaryItems.noReconciliation: Reconciliation, exports, and analytics are not part of this baseline.

empty.heading: No ledger entries yet
empty.note: Ledger entries will appear here when financial activity is recorded.

error.heading: Ledger entries are not available right now

settlements.title: Review settlement records tied to your practitioner earnings.
settlements.note: This surface provides a visibility-first view of payout records and status updates.

scopeItems.history: Settlement history with timestamps and payout state.
scopeItems.statuses: Current status for each settlement record.
scopeItems.amounts: Gross, adjustments, and net amounts per settlement.

boundaryItems.noPayouts: Payout actions are not available in this view.
boundaryItems.noLedger: Ledger history remains a separate surface.
boundaryItems.noAdjustments: Manual adjustments and reconciliation are not part of this baseline.

empty.heading: No settlements yet
empty.note: Settlement records will appear here when payouts are generated.

error.heading: Settlements are not available right now

errors.practitionerNotFound: Your practitioner profile could not be found.
errors.invalidFilter: Some ledger filters are not supported.
errors.forbidden: Your account is not allowed to access this finance data.
errors.notFound: Financial data could not be found in scope.
errors.generic: Could not load finance data right now.
